The user wants me to identify all segments in the video where English is spoken.

1.  **Analyze the video:**
    *   The video starts with John Park speaking Korean (00:00 - 00:31).
    *   At 00:31, the scene shifts to a cafe where Tim Burton, Jenna Ortega, and Emma Myers are sitting.
    *   From 00:31 onwards, the conversation is primarily in English, with John Park occasionally speaking Korean to translate or add context, but the main dialogue is English.
    *   I need to check for any interruptions of Korean that might break the English segments.
    *   Looking at the transcript and video:

        *   01:18 - 01:29: English conversation (Tim Burton and Jenna Ortega speaking).
        *   01:29 - 01:34: John Park speaks Korean ("Really? Talking about the whole project...").
        *   01:34 - 01:38: English conversation (Tim Burton).
        *   01:38 - 01:44: English conversation (Tim Burton).
        *   01:44 - 01:48: John Park speaks Korean ("Yeah, me too, actually.").
        *   01:48 - 01:56: English conversation.
        *   01:56 - 02:00: John Park speaks Korean ("So you got here yesterday, correct?").
        *   02:00 - 02:03: English conversation.
        *   02:03 - 02:05: John Park speaks Korean ("Saturday morning, I see.").
        *   02:05 - 02:12: English conversation.
        *   02:12 - 02:16: John Park speaks Korean ("I know Tim, you've been to Korea...").
        *   02:16 - 02:24: English conversation.
        *   02:24 - 02:26: John Park speaks Korean ("Yes, in Dongdaemun, yeah.").
        *   02:26 - 02:30: English conversation.
        *   02:30 - 02:34: John Park speaks Korean ("And I know this is your first time, Jenna.").
        *   02:34 - 02:45: English conversation.
        *   02:45 - 02:49: John Park speaks Korean ("Emma you've been to Korea I heard").
        *   02:49 - 02:55: John Park speaks Korean ("I know that you follow some K-pop groups...").
        *   02:55 - 03:00: English conversation.
        *   03:00 - 03:04: John Park speaks Korean ("You talk about it so nonchalantly.").
        *   03:04 - 03:10: English conversation.
        *   03:10 - 03:14: English conversation (Tim Burton).
        *   03:14 - 03:20: English conversation (Emma Myers).
        *   03:20 - 03:24: John Park speaks Korean ("Do you listen to K-pop from time to time?").
        *   03:24 - 03:28: John Park speaks Korean ("Have you ever heard about John Park?").
        *   03:28 - 03:34: English conversation.
        *   03:34 - 03:40: John Park speaks Korean ("Yes? You've heard of John Park?").
        *   03:40 - 03:46: English conversation.
        *   03:46 - 03:50: John Park speaks Korean ("Give her your CD.").
        *   03:50 - 03:54: English conversation (Tim Burton).
        *   03:54 - 03:58: John Park speaks Korean ("You guys having an okay time here?").
        *   03:58 - 04:02: English conversation.
        *   04:02 - 04:06: John Park speaks Korean ("Is this your house or no?").
        *   04:06 - 04:12: English conversation.
        *   04:12 - 04:20: John Park speaks Korean ("I hope this 40 minutes can be a little break...").
        *   04:20 - 04:24: English conversation.
        *   04:24 - 04:32: John Park speaks Korean ("I'm a big fan of <Wednesday> and also you, Tim.").
        *   04:32 - 04:40: John Park speaks Korean ("We did a promotion for <Beetlejuice Beetlejuice>...").
        *   04:40 - 04:46: English conversation.
        *   04:46 - 04:52: English conversation.
        *   04:52 - 04:56: John Park speaks Korean ("Homemade, yeah. Always the best.").
        *   04:56 - 05:08: English conversation.
        *   05:08 - 05:16: John Park speaks Korean ("It was just kind of doing as many sort of live effects...").
        *   05:16 - 05:22: John Park speaks Korean ("And it felt nostalgic...").
        *   05:22 - 05:28: English conversation.
        *   05:28 - 05:32: John Park speaks Korean ("And having some of the original cast...").
        *   05:32 - 05:44: English conversation.
        *   05:44 - 05:48: John Park speaks Korean ("See yeah and I really had a blast watching it").
        *   05:48 - 06:16: English conversation.
        *   06:16 - 06:22: John Park speaks Korean ("I don't know how I would feel if a director that I admired...").
        *   06:22 - 06:28: John Park speaks Korean ("How did it feel for you guys working with Tim Burton?").
        *   06:28 - 06:38: English conversation.
        *   06:38 - 06:42: John Park speaks Korean ("What's the currency here?").
        *   06:42 - 06:54: English conversation.
        *   06:54 - 07:02: English conversation.
        *   07:02 - 07:12: English conversation.
        *   07:12 - 07:22: English conversation.
        *   07:22 - 07:26: John Park speaks Korean ("Sure. So to do that in front of people you admire...").
        *   07:26 - 07:32: English conversation.
        *   07:32 - 07:38: John Park speaks Korean ("Has anything changed for you, Emma?").
        *   07:38 - 07:50: English conversation.
        *   07:50 - 07:54: English conversation.
        *   07:54 - 08:02: English conversation.
        *   08:02 - 08:14: English conversation.
        *   08:14 - 08:22: John Park speaks Korean ("Was there like a moment that you really felt impressed...").

        *   08:44 - 08:56: English conversation.

        *   09:18 - 09:26: English conversation.
        *   09:26 - 09:32: John Park speaks Korean ("That's very cool to hear. I'm a singer in Korea...").
        *   09:32 - 09:46: John Park speaks Korean ("And when I listen to people in a different line of work...").
        *   09:46 - 09:54: English conversation.

        *   10:58 - 11:06: John Park speaks Korean ("I feel like that's such a...").

        *   11:12 - 11:16: English conversation.
        *   11:16 - 11:26: English conversation.
        *   11:26 - 11:32: English conversation.
        *   11:32 - 11:38: English conversation.

        *   11:42 - 11:46: John Park speaks Korean ("How do you feel, Emma?").
        *   11:46 - 11:56: English conversation.
        *   11:56 - 12:06: English conversation.
        *   12:06 - 12:14: English conversation.
        *   12:14 - 12:20: English conversation.
        *   12:20 - 12:26: John Park speaks Korean ("And you've talked about how the show resonates with people...").
        *   12:26 - 12:34: English conversation.
        *   12:34 - 12:38: John Park speaks Korean ("Do you ever get that kind of reaction to bands?").
        *   12:38 - 12:46: English conversation.
        *   12:46 - 12:52: English conversation.
        *   12:52 - 12:58: English conversation.
        *   12:58 - 13:10: English conversation.
        *   13:10 - 13:20: English conversation.
        *   13:20 - 13:24: John Park speaks Korean ("Is there anything that you guys wanted to talk about...").
        *   13:24 - 13:34: English conversation.
        *   13:34 - 13:40: English conversation.

        *   13:44 - 13:50: English conversation.

        *   15:44 - 15:48: English conversation.
        *   15:48 - 15:56: John Park speaks Korean ("Back in COVID, there were a couple of shows...").

        *   16:24 - 16:32: John Park speaks Korean ("and maybe this time I can take one from you guys...").
